hero.subtitle: Senior Software Engineer · Team Lead & Architecture
hero.description: I build web apps with Angular / React and native mobile apps with Ionic / React Native, with a focus on clean architecture and good user experience. I reach for .NET on the back‑end when projects call for it.

skills.label: What I work with
skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.description: Most of my time is spent on the front end, but I'm comfortable moving across the stack when the project needs it.

about.label: Who I am
about.title: About Me
about.description: Senior Software Engineer with a background in software architecture and team leadership.
about.p1: I'm a Senior Software Engineer currently at HTEC, working on a mobile-first health app built with Ionic, Angular and ASP.NET Web API. Before that, I spent several years at CertiCon where I eventually moved into a Software Architect role. Projects I've worked on include Bosch, Medtronic and Tolion.
about.p2: Most of my work has been on the front end, but I've always been comfortable jumping into the full stack when needed. I've led small teams, shaped technical decisions, and tried to keep code quality and long-term maintainability high.
about.p3: On the side, I've been doing freelance mobile development since 2015, mostly Ionic and Angular, with React Native more recently. I enjoy the end-to-end ownership that comes with it, from the first commit to publishing on the App Store.
about.h1Desc: Across front-end, mobile and back-end in both product and agency environments
about.h2Desc: Led technical direction and mentored developers at CertiCon
about.h3Desc: Angular, React, Ionic, .NET and Azure, depending on what the project needs
about.h4Desc: Keeping up with new tools and patterns as the ecosystem changes
about.ucDesc: I try to build things that are actually pleasant to use
about.sdDesc: Writing code the next developer (or future me) can understand and extend
about.pfDesc: Fast apps make users happy. I keep an eye on bundle size and render performance

experience.label: Where I've been
experience.title: Experience
experience.description: A look at the relevant roles from the last 10 years.

items.htec: Building a mobile-first health product at Tolion Health. Full-stack across Ionic + Angular + Capacitor and ASP.NET Web API, with a focus on architecture, Azure AD B2C/PKCE auth, HealthKit/Garmin integration, performance, and UX.
items.freelance: Coding has always been my passion, not just my profession, so a few years ago I decided to take on freelance work on the side. I build native mobile apps for iOS and Android, primarily with Angular + Ionic and React Native, handling everything from development to App Store and Google Play deployment.
items.ccvis: Developed a web application for SaaS subscription activation on the Microsoft Azure Marketplace. Modular platform, reusable components, high development standards.
items.foxconn: Front-end for an ERP system and real-time production line management tool, tracking component flow, quality metrics, and optimising manufacturing processes.

bosch.name: Bosch
bosch.desc: Greenfield Angular + TypeScript project for automobile diagnostics. Micro Frontends via module federation, RxJS, NRWL NGXS, Material CDK, Karma/Jasmine testing.

embitron.name: Embitron
embitron.desc: Cloud application for recording and managing healthcare devices. C#, ASP.NET 6.0, Angular, Azure cloud services and storage.

erp.name: ERP
erp.desc: Internal ERP system using Angular, TypeScript, RxJS, NRWL NGXS and custom Material CDK components.

projects.label: Things I've worked on
projects.title: Projects
projects.description: A few selected projects I've worked on over the years.

items.hudba: Concert app with ticket purchasing, location-based event search and vineyard navigation. Built for a Czech open-air concert series.
items.tolion: Brain health app with AI coaching, personalized activity suggestions and cognitive performance tracking. Includes a Brain Age indicator and weekly summaries.
items.tpodlahy: Website for a flooring company. Service overview, photo gallery, contact form and info about vinyl, laminate and parquet.
items.qrticket: Event check-in app with QR scanning, online/offline mode, real-time attendance tracking and exportable reports for organizers.
items.findtastic: Price comparison app for US customers. Tracks prices across multiple e-commerce stores and surfaces the best deals in real time.
items.mdas: Desktop app for monitoring medical device safety alerts and regulatory compliance. Covers implantable devices like insulin pumps, pacemakers and defibrillators.
items.ccvision: Web app for real-time object detection and recognition, integrated with various hardware platforms.

contact.label: Get in touch
contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Have a project in mind or want to talk through an idea? Drop me a line.
contact.formDesc: I usually reply within a day or two.
contact.name: Name
contact.success: Message sent. I'll get back to you soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Try again or email me directly.
contact.availableDesc: Looking at interesting full-time roles and freelance projects, especially front-end architecture, mobile development or anything TypeScript-heavy.
